## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content marketing progress, performance updates, and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends: increased clicks, improved rankings, and good engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards data preparation in data clouds, emphasizing self-service for data analysts while maintaining governance](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Two follow-up meetings planned: (1) onboarding Cody to processes, (2) discussing new positioning and target audience adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

## Topics

### Content Delivery and Performance Update

  - [Delivered 3 articles last week, with 4 more in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Clicks and rankings improved, particularly for the data governance article](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [GA4 shows increased views, sessions, and ChatGPT referrals (5 new clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Engaged sessions at 45%+ across the board, indicating good content consumption](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Analytics and Measurement Refinement

  - [Exploring GA4 for tracking significant actions (e.g., demo requests, content downloads)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Discussing potential use of Qualified data to identify ICP engagement](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Acknowledged need for more data (typically 4+ months) to draw meaningful conversion insights](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### Strategic Content Direction

  - [Shifting focus from pure data engineering to data preparation in cloud contexts](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Emphasizing self-service capabilities for data analysts, scientists, and business users](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Maintaining governance and security as key themes](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Balancing content to appeal to both platform teams (primary decision-makers) and end-users (influential stakeholders)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Team Updates and Introductions

  - [Mara Leighton joined GrowthX as Associate Director (2nd week)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Cody Carmen joined Prophecy as Content Operations lead (2nd week)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - Matt Turner overseeing marketing efforts at Prophecy
  - Raveena Kapatkar handling website updates and digital campaigns

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule onboarding session with Cody to review content processes (tentatively Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Arrange longer meeting to discuss new positioning and target audience (tentatively Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up with Evan regarding Qualified setup and GA4 exploration](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Matt to provide community/influencer reference points for content research](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Review proposed topics for upcoming content in the shared document](https://fathom.video/share/VLydBG6jJwJf18_Km925DhMqeSd-TPvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
